dummy_score.provenance: target package import blocked before collection

candidate_score.historical_comparison: Historical source-carrier score was 282 passed, 428 failed, 82 skipped; one environment-driven skip is now a failure in the fresh native run.

caveats: The current repository scorer uses same-process pytest isolation and does not defend against an actively malicious candidate.

weaknesses.description: The candidate passes many atomic tree and grammar cases but fails most cross-engine parser behavior.
